description_long: This is a life-sized model of a white dove, perched upright on a small, square black base. The bird's plumage is predominantly white with subtle hints of light gray and faint brown shading around the head and beak area. Its beak is short, straight, and conical, colored in a muted brownish tone. The eyes are dark and round, giving the bird a gentle and alert expression. The legs and feet are thin, brown, and slightly textured, gripping the base securely. The tail is long and slightly rounded, with feathers neatly layered and extending behind the body.
description: A realistic white dove with subtle gray and brown accents, perched on a black square base with a long, rounded tail and conical beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the dove, highlighting its white plumage, brown beak, and long, rounded tail.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back and tail feathers, emphasizing the smooth, white plumage and the alignment of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with the head turned slightly, showing the other side of the face and body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, beak, and chest, with both eyes visible and the feet gripping the base.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid white with faint gray and brown shading around the head and wings
